provisions.title: Citation and application
provisions.content:
1. Citation and application
These Regulations may be cited as the National Library Service Regulations and shall apply in relation to libraries.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: any library at which library facilities have been established under section 3 of the Act, and the several rooms, passages, staircases, entrances and exits forming part thereof and adjacent thereto
the Director or his duly authorised representative
